import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  mut product = 1
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let n = string.len(s)
    mut i = 0
    mut cur = 0
    mut has_digit = false
    mut negative = false
    while i < n
      let b_opt = string.byte_at(s, i)
      match b_opt
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if has_digit
            if negative
              product = product * (-cur)
            else
              product = product * cur
            end
            cur = 0
            has_digit = false
            negative = false
          end
        else if b == 45
          negative = true
        else if b == 43
          negative = false
        else
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
          has_digit = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has_digit
      if negative
        product = product * (-cur)
      else
        product = product * cur
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
